name: Blocks Fusion
author: Poki
description: Blocks Fusion is a fresh twist on classic puzzle gameplay! Drop multicolored blocks onto the board and strategically place them to form groups of four or more matching colors. Watch as they disappear, making room for new pieces and racking up points! With random falling shapes and fast-paced decision-making, every move counts. Think fast, match smart, and keep the board clear—how long can you last? How to play Blocks Fusion? Click to select the blocks, hold to move them, and release to place them. Who created Blocks Fusion? Blocks Fusion is created by GeTech. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Blocks Fusion for free? You can play Blocks Fusion for free on Poki. Can I play Blocks Fusion on mobile devices and desktop? Blocks Fusion can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
